articles.title: Why Bitcoin's next breakout may not be an altcoin season signal
articles.description: Many investors rely on bullish breakouts from Bitcoin as a sign of the next altcoin season but data suggests this strategy is flawed.

articles.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Has His Doubts Over Cardano’s “Scientific Method”
